App.Title: Pocok Showcase
App.Subtitle: Package reference and runnable examples for Pocok.

Home.Title: Pocok packages, with runnable examples
Home.Intro: Browse the package catalog or run bounded examples against installed packages. Each example uses the package's public API and runs in an isolated per-user scope.
Home.StartText: Installed examples call the package's public API with editable input and structured results. Open the featured example or choose another package below.

Package.PlannedMessage: This package is listed in the catalog, but this deployment does not include a Showcase plugin for it.
Package.ContributorGuidance: Add a plugin under samples/Showcase and reuse the shared contracts, components, localization, and manifest-based publishing.
Package.NotFoundText: The requested package is not part of the current deployment catalog.

Footer.Tagline: Bounded in-process examples using the packages' public APIs.

System.Title: System status
System.Intro: Runtime details for loaded modules and the deployment catalog.
System.LogConsoleDescription: Show the bounded synthetic Showcase log stream in the left rail.

Errors.Title: The request could not be completed
Errors.Text: The application did not expose internal error details. Return to the package catalog and try again.
Errors.NotFoundText: The requested showcase page does not exist.

Pocok_Conversion.Summary: Policy-driven conversion with explicit failures, collection handling, and bounded recursion.

Pocok_Readiness.Summary: Restartable startup and readiness coordination with explicit failure and cancellation states.

Pocok_AppDefaults.Summary: Ordered application configurators for repeatable host setup.

Pocok_AppDefaults_Logging.Summary: Conservative Microsoft.Extensions.Logging defaults driven by configuration.

Pocok_AppDefaults_Logging_Serilog.Summary: Serilog host defaults through the Pocok application configurator model.

Pocok_Modularity_Contracts.Summary: Shared contracts for hosts and trusted startup modules.

Pocok_Modularity.Summary: Manifest-based discovery and registration of trusted in-process modules.

Pocok_BackgroundWork.Summary: Concurrency helpers for coalescing, debouncing, repetition, and task observation.

Pocok_Scripting.Summary: Bounded JavaScript execution with explicit bindings, modules, and structured failures.

Pocok_Localization.Summary: Deterministic JSON and RESX localization with ordered provider composition.

Pocok_Signals.Summary: Typed signal reads, writes, subscriptions, quality, and connection state.

Pocok_Subscriptions.Summary: Thread-safe keyed subscriptions with typed filtering and mapping.

Pocok_Licensing.Summary: Signed offline licenses with validation, runtime enforcement, and CLI tools.

Pocok_AppDefaults_Licensing.Summary: Host configuration and enforcement defaults for Pocok.Licensing.
